feat.critical_failure: The creature is knocked prone and takes 1d6 bludgeoning damage from the fall.
feat.name: Stomp Ground
feat.success: The creature is off-guard until the end of your turn.
feat.text: You bring your booted foot down on the ground with enough force to rattle your foes. Each creature in a 5-foot emanation must attempt a Reflex saving throw against your class DC.

traits.name: Guardian
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the guardian class.
